(b) Complete the tree diagram.
\newline

(c) Find the probability that on any day Amira goes fishing.
\newline

qtype: simple and compound interest calculations, percentage increase
tex:
(a) Hong has \$4000 to invest.
\newline

She invests \$2000 at a rate of 2.5\% per year **simple** interest.
\newline

She also invests \$2000 at a rate of 2\% per year **compound** interest.
\newline

(i) (b) Find the value of each investment at the end of 8 years.
\newline

(c) Find the overall percentage increase in the \$4000 investment at the end of 8 years.
\newline

(d) Find the number of complete years it takes for the compound interest investment of \$2000 to become greater than \$2500.
\newline

(e) Alain invests \$5000 at a rate of $r$\% per year compound interest.
\newline

At the end of 15 years, the value of the investment is \$7566.
\newline

Find the value of $r$.
\newline

content.content:
Hong has \$4000 to invest.
\newline

She invests \$2000 at a rate of 2.5\% per year \textbf{simple} interest.
\newline

She also invests \$2000 at a rate of 2\% per year \textbf{compound} interest.
\newline

Find the value of each investment at the end of 8 years.
\newline

Find the overall percentage increase in the \$4000 investment at the end of 8 years.
\newline

Find the number of complete years it takes for the compound interest investment of \$2000 to become greater than \$2500.
\newline

Alain invests \$5000 at a rate of $r$\% per year compound interest.
\newline

At the end of 15 years, the value of the investment is \$7566.
\newline

Find the value of $r$.
\newline

qtype: upper/lower bounds calculation for speed, unit conversion
tex:

\newline

\newline

Give your answer in kilometres/hour.
\newline

The walk takes 133 minutes, correct to the nearest minute.

\vgap

Give your answer in kilometres/hour.
